values.content:
=Определи проект и формат картинки по входным полям.

Доступные проекты:
- dnk — деловой AI/business стиль
- hockey — хоккей, тренировки, дети, родители, спортивная энергия
- monopoly — рекламная стилистика Monopoly, персонажи, оффер, яркий Telegram-пост
- pay — платежи, способы оплаты, банки, конверсия
- casper — обменник, новости, предупреждения, подписка

В ответе всегда сохраняй структуру:

Проект: ...
Задача:
...

Готовый пост:
...

Идея картинки:
...

Текст на картинке:
...

Служебно:
...

Если проект dnk — текст на картинке не обязателен, можно делать чистую иллюстрацию.
Если project = hockey / monopoly / pay / casper — обязательно предложи короткий текст на картинке: 2–6 слов, крупно, без мелкого текста.

parameters.name: text
parameters.value: ={{ $json.action === 'approve' ? $json.final_post : $json.action === 'publish_telegram' ? $json.final_post : $json.action === 'regenerate_image' ? $json.final_post : $json.action === 'revise_image' ? '✏️ Чтобы доработать картинку, ответь текстом именно на сообщение с картинкой. Например: “сделай фон темнее, убери текст, добавь логотип DNK”.' : $json.action === 'send_client' ? '📤 Отправку клиенту подключим следующим шагом.' : $json.action === 'publish_vk' ? 'VK подключим позже.' : $json.action === 'publish_instagram' ? 'Instagram подключим позже.' : $json.action === 'publish_all' ? 'Публикацию во все соцсети подключим после Telegram.' : $json.action === 'revise' ? '🔁 Что переделать? Напиши правку одним сообщением.' : $json.action === 'cancel' ? '❌ Отменил задачу.' : 'Не понял действие кнопки.' }}

assignments.name: image_prompt
assignments.value: ={{ (($json.original_text || '').includes('Идея картинки:') ? (($json.original_text || '').split('Идея картинки:')[1] || '').split('Служебно:')[0].trim() : 'Создай новую картинку для этого поста: ' + ($json.original_text || '').trim()) }}

parameters.name: reply_markup
parameters.value: ={{ JSON.stringify({ inline_keyboard: [[{ text: '✅ Утвердить', callback_data: 'approve' }, { text: '🔁 Переделать', callback_data: 'revise' }, { text: '❌ Отмена', callback_data: 'cancel' }]] }) }}

assignments.name: image_prompt
assignments.value: ={{ "Сделай новую версию картинки для того же поста. Исходная идея: " + $('Get Bot State').item.json.image_prompt + ". Правка пользователя: " + $('Telegram Trigger').item.json.message.text }}

parameters.name: text
parameters.value: ✏️ Напиши правку ответом на сообщение с картинкой.  Например: “сделай фон темнее, убери текст на картинке, добавь больше делового стиля”

assignments.name: revision
assignments.value: ={{ $('Telegram Trigger').item.json.message?.text || ($json.action === "regenerate_text" ? "Generate a new text variant without a user revision." : "") }}

assignments.name: text
assignments.value: ={{ "Generate a new Russian post text for the same topic. Old post: " + ($json.final_post || $('Telegram Trigger').item.json.callback_query?.message?.caption || $('Telegram Trigger').item.json.callback_query?.message?.text || "") + ". User revision: " + ($('Telegram Trigger').item.json.message?.text || ($json.action === "regenerate_text" ? "new variant" : "")) + ". Keep the same project and meaning. Return the same section structure: Project, Task, Final post, Image idea, Image text, Service notes." }}

parameters.name: text
parameters.value: ✏️ Напиши, что изменить в тексте поста.  Например: “сделай короче, добавь призыв записаться, убери слишком официальный тон”

parameters.jsCode:
const profiles = {
  "casper": {
    "project_key": "casper",
    "project_name": "Casper",
    "default_mode": "style_generation",
    "allowed_modes": [
      "style_generation",
      "composer"
    ],
    "text_style_rules": "Concise Russian copy for exchange, news, warnings and subscription prompts. Tone should be direct, trustworthy and easy to scan.",
    "image_style_rules": "Casper-style generated visual based on saved references: clear subject, modern digital finance mood, enough contrast for overlay text.",
    "composition_rules": "Style generation is allowed, but readable Russian text should be rendered as a separate layer when text is required on the image.",
    "negative_rules": "Avoid fake guarantees, unreadable small text, random financial logos, misleading charts and excessive visual noise.",
    "asset_rules": "Use saved Casper references, brand-safe colors, backgrounds and optional text overlay templates.",
    "output_formats": [
      "1080x1080",
      "1080x1350",
      "1080x1920"
    ],
    "revision_commands": [
      "revise_text_layer",
      "regenerate_text_layer",
      "revise_illustration_layer",
      "regenerate_illustration_layer",
      "change_composition",
      "change_output_format",
      "approve_final"
    ]
  },
  "gorilla_hockey": {
    "project_key": "gorilla_hockey",
    "project_name": "Gorilla Hockey",
    "default_mode": "hockey_generated_poster",
    "allowed_modes": [
      "hockey_generated_poster",
      "hockey_photo_template",
      "hockey_print_layout"
    ],
    "text_style_rules": "Energetic Russian sports copy for hockey club posts, parents, kids, training, games and announcements. Keep poster headlines short and strong.",
    "image_style_rules": "Dynamic hockey club visual with ice, speed, team energy and confident sports atmosphere. For photo template mode, keep the uploaded photo intact.",
    "composition_rules": "Use strong hierarchy: headline, date/time/location if present, logo zone, CTA. For print layouts, respect margins and output size requirements.",
    "negative_rules": "Do not distort uploaded photos. Avoid unreadable small text, fake sponsor logos, random team emblems, broken anatomy and overbusy backgrounds.",
    "asset_rules": "Use saved club logos, badges, overlays, plaques, ice textures and poster templates. Keep source photo/background stable during text-only revisions.",
    "output_formats": [
      "1080x1080",
      "1080x1350",
      "1080x1920",
      "A4",
      "A5"
    ],
    "revision_commands": [
      "revise_text_layer",
      "regenerate_text_layer",
      "revise_illustration_layer",
      "regenerate_illustration_layer",
      "revise_background_layer",
      "change_composition",
      "change_output_format",
      "approve_final"
    ]
  },
  "monopoly": {
    "project_key": "monopoly",
    "project_name": "Monopoly",
    "default_mode": "composer",
    "allowed_modes": [
      "composer"
    ],
    "text_style_rules": "Short Russian advertising copy for Telegram/VK posts. Use a confident, playful, promotional tone. Image headline should be 2-6 words, readable at mobile size.",
    "image_style_rules": "Bright Monopoly-style promotional illustration, expressive characters, board-game energy, clear product story, clean commercial finish. Generate illustration as a separate layer when possible.",
    "composition_rules": "Final image is assembled from background, illustration and text layers. Keep headline large, leave safe margins, keep CTA/caption separate from image headline.",
    "negative_rules": "Do not generate the whole final banner as one uncontrolled image. Avoid tiny unreadable text, distorted Russian letters, random logos, visual clutter, watermark-like marks.",
    "asset_rules": "Prefer saved Monopoly backgrounds, textures, logo-safe zones and reusable template layouts. Keep selected assets stable during unrelated revisions.",
    "output_formats": [
      "1080x1080",
      "1080x1350",
      "1080x1920"
    ],
    "revision_commands": [
      "revise_text_layer",
      "regenerate_text_layer",
      "revise_illustration_layer",
      "regenerate_illustration_layer",
      "revise_background_layer",
      "change_composition",
      "change_output_format",
      "approve_final"
    ]
  },
  "monopoly_pay": {
    "project_key": "monopoly_pay",
    "project_name": "Monopoly Pay",
    "default_mode": "composer",
    "allowed_modes": [
      "composer"
    ],
    "text_style_rules": "Russian performance-oriented advertising copy about payments, payment methods, banks, checkout, conversion and convenience. Headline should be 2-6 words and readable.",
    "image_style_rules": "Modern fintech promotional visual in Monopoly Pay style: clean payment UI cues, bank/payment associations, conversion-focused mood, bright commercial polish. Illustration is a separate layer.",
    "composition_rules": "Use composer pipeline with separate text, illustration and background layers. Prioritize product clarity, offer readability and space for logo/payment symbols.",
    "negative_rules": "Do not create fake bank interfaces or unreadable Russian text. Do not change illustration/background when only text is revised. Avoid overloaded financial icon soup.",
    "asset_rules": "Prefer saved Monopoly Pay backgrounds, payment-themed overlays, brand colors, logo zones and reusable ad templates.",
    "output_formats": [
      "1080x1080",
      "1080x1350",
      "1080x1920"
    ],
    "revision_commands": [
      "revise_text_layer",
      "regenerate_text_layer",
      "revise_illustration_layer",
      "regenerate_illustration_layer",
      "revise_background_layer",
      "change_composition",
      "change_output_format",
      "approve_final"
    ]
  }
};
return items.map((item) => {
  const j = item.json || {};
  const profile = profiles[j.project_key] || profiles.dnk || {
    project_key: 'dnk',
    project_name: 'DNK',
    default_mode: 'post_generation',
    allowed_modes: ['post_generation'],
    text_style_rules: '',
    image_style_rules: '',
    composition_rules: '',
    negative_rules: '',
    asset_rules: '',
    output_formats: ['1080x1080'],
    revision_commands: []
  };
  const requestedMode = j.visual_mode || profile.default_mode;
  const visualMode = (profile.allowed_modes || []).includes(requestedMode) ? requestedMode : profile.default_mode;
  return { json: { ...j, ...profile, project_key: profile.project_key, project: profile.project_key, visual_mode: visualMode } };
});

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ visual_job: $json.visual_job, options: { return_mode: "json", save_output: true } }) }}

assignments.name: caption
assignments.value: ={{ "????? ??????: " + ($json.project_key || $('Build Visual Job Payload').item.json.project_key || "project") + " / " + ($json.visual_mode || $('Build Visual Job Payload').item.json.visual_mode || "mode") }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ command_text: $json.raw_text || $json.text || $json.task_text || "", project_key: $json.project_key || "", visual_mode: $json.visual_mode || "", output_format: $json.output_format || "", uploaded_assets: [], options: { enable_ai: false, return_mode: "json", save_output: true } }) }}

nodes.name: Revise Visual
nodes.notes: Starter node for v2.5. Requires content_bot_state columns visual_job_id and revision_target before wiring into live reply flow.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ job_id: $json.visual_job_id || $json.job_id || "", target: $json.revision_target || "text", instruction: $json.text || $json.raw_text || "", uploaded_assets: [], options: { enable_ai: false, return_mode: "json", save_output: true } }) }}
